AI-Powered Productivity Platform

YOUR VOICE
SHOULD RUN YOUR
WORKFLOW.

Not slow it down.

Nova is the AI-powered voice layer for everyday computer work. Natural commands, intelligent automation, and instant execution — built for everyone who wants to stop fighting their machine and start working with it.

Why Nova

The productivity layer
your computer was
always missing.

Three core technologies, working together to make your voice the most powerful input device you own.

Core Technology

Voice Intelligence

Speak naturally. Work instantly.

Nova understands complex, multi-step commands and executes them in milliseconds — no training, no keyword triggers, no friction. Just talk the way you normally would.

  • Natural language command parsing
  • Multi-step action chaining
  • Context-aware follow-up
Automation

Smart Workflows

One command. A hundred actions.

Chain apps, files, and workflows into single voice triggers. Nova's automation engine handles the complexity of cross-application tasks so you never have to context-switch.

  • Cross-app workflow automation
  • Custom macro creation
  • Scheduled & triggered routines
Integration

Universal Reach

Works with everything, everywhere.

From your IDE to your inbox, from Windows to macOS, Nova integrates with every app on every platform without plugins, API keys, or configuration headaches.

  • Cross-platform compatibility
  • Zero-setup app integration
  • Works with legacy software

By The Numbers

Benchmarks that prove
the difference.

94.2%

Command accuracy

Measured across 10,000+ voice interactions in real prototype testing.

340ms

Response latency

Median time from voice input to completed action in internal benchmarks.

$99/yr

Pro plan pricing

Built for mainstream adoption — not enterprise budgets.

See It In Action

Real commands.
Real digital tasks.
Zero friction.

The product direction is clear: natural speech controlling navigation, typing, search, and app workflows with professional-grade speed and reliability.

  • "Open Chrome, search Scholar for transformer attention mechanisms, and open the first 3 results."
  • "Switch to Slack, summarize unread messages, and draft a quick reply to the latest thread."
  • "Run morning setup: Spotify, calendar overview, project docs, and my dev workspace — one command."
  • "Go to Google Docs, start a new meeting notes template, and share it with my team."
Watch the full demo on YouTube

Live prototype demo — recorded in one take, no scripting.

Built Broad On Purpose

A mainstream product,
not a narrow niche
tool.

Whether you're a student managing research, a developer running builds, or a professional trying to reclaim two hours a day — Nova was designed from the ground up to work for everyone.

Students & Researchers

Open papers, switch tabs, draft notes, and cross-reference sources without losing your research momentum.

Developers & Builders

Trigger builds, navigate codebases, and run workflow steps while keeping your hands on the keyboard.

Creators & Operators

Manage tabs, notes, exports, and communication while your focus stays on the work that actually matters.

Low-Mobility Users

Full computer control through voice alone — reducing physical strain without sacrificing capability or speed.

Busy Professionals

Compress an hour of digital busywork into minutes with natural commands and intelligent task automation.

Teams & Institutions

Standardize voice-driven workflows across entire organizations with scalable, cross-platform deployment.

Join The Early Cohort

Your voice should run
your workflow.
Not slow it down.

Be first to access beta invitations, feature drops, and onboarding updates as Nova expands from early access to broader everyday use.
